title: geranium collinum eglandulosum
intro: Geranium collinum eglandulosum, commonly known as Geranium collinum, is a plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its unique characteristics and therapeutic properties. The health benefits of Geranium collinum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular choice in homeopathy and herbal medicine. The bioactive constituents of Geranium collinum eglandulosum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
